name: pilot-shell
description: Professional development environment wrapper for Claude Code that enforces tests, formatting, linting, and type checking on every edit. Installs via curl-pipe-bash script. Configures Claude hooks, MCP servers, skills, and dev container. Designed for agentic, autonomous software development sessions.

findings_summary.notes: Individual developer repo with a proprietary/non-OSI license (custom 'All rights reserved' agreement, not an open source license). No SECURITY.md. Installation via curl-pipe-bash which is a significant security risk requiring trust in the author. Installs Claude Code hooks, MCP servers, and shell integrations that modify the development environment broadly. Actively maintained (recent Feb 2026 commits, 0 open issues). High stars (1441) indicate popularity. Risk stems from: (1) curl-pipe-bash installation vector, (2) proprietary license restricting inspection/auditing rights, (3) broad environment modification scope.
